scene_title: Deus falso de pixels se fragmentando
narrative_beat: Figura dourada e branca explodindo em cubos carmesim

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid artificial false god in luminous gold and white at center fragmenting into crimson data cubes revealing artificial nature from above in diagonal aerial perspective in vibrant foreground
subject.focal_point: the false god fragmenting into crimson data cubes revealing its artificial nature
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated crowd prostrated in worship seen from above with unrecognizable grey faces in background
props: artificial false god in gold and white

composition.foreground: false god in vivid gold crimson

mood.emotion: AI-generated religion — sacred texts and gods by algorithm

symbolism.primary: the idol that fragments — all AI gods will be revealed as data
symbolism.secondary: the worshipping crowd not knowing what it bows before

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
